hero.headline: From NTC chip to finished sensor — under one roof.
hero.subhead: 30 years of vertically integrated sensing manufacturing for global OEMs. NTC thermistors and photoelectric components for appliance, automotive, and 3C electronics applications.

reasons.title: In-house vertical integration
reasons.body: We produce our own NTC chips, elements, and finished sensors. One supplier, one accountability point, tighter tolerances.

reasons.title: Precision tolerance leadership
reasons.body: Tolerances down to ±1 % across resistance and B-value, qualified for high-volume OEM use.

reasons.title: OEM agility
reasons.body: Send a target curve, B-value, or full mechanical drawing. Feasibility review in five working days.

productsIntro.title: Eight NTC product lines covering −50 °C to +250 °C.
productsIntro.subtitle: Tolerances to ±1 %, form factors from glass bead to 500 µm thin film. Every part qualified for high-volume OEM use.

oem.title: OEM and customization, from spec to scale.
oem.body: Send us a target curve, B-value, footprint, or full mechanical drawing. We respond with feasibility within five working days, ship qualification samples, and move to mass production on your schedule.

applicationsIntro.title: Built into appliances people rely on, vehicles they trust, and devices they use every day.
applicationsIntro.subtitle: Three industries. Eight product lines. One vertically integrated supplier.

manufacturing.title: Chip, element, and sensor — produced in-house.
manufacturing.body: Vertical integration is what lets us promise tighter tolerances, faster iteration, and shorter lead times.

about.title: 30 years of precision sensing.
about.body: SEN TECH has manufactured precision sensing components in Taiwan since 1994. Our customers include appliance, automotive, and 3C electronics OEMs across [TBD: 20+ countries].
